title: erigeron zacatensis
intro: Erigeron zacatensis, also known as Zacatecas fleabane, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly containing flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its potential health benefits. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, fever, and gastrointestinal issues, and its health benefits include antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Erigeron zacatensis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in some herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
